meaning: adj.混乱的,害了病的,发狂的
examples: Poor little friendless rat, doubtless his mind has been disordered with ill-usage.
Crystal is an ordered solid, as opposed to a disordered solid.
The room was disordered when they arrived at the scene of the burglary.
Such choice appeals to attention-deficit-disordered baby boomers like myself. n Helping the old get young.
The line between normal and disordered is extraordinarily murky, as it always has been.
